title: ctenitis quelpartensis
intro: Ctenitis quelpartensis, also known as Quelpart fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis quelpartensis include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Ctenitis quelpartensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
